node.text:
tocca a te decidere. 🫵😉
hai una decisione da prendere.

you have a decision to make. 🫵😉
chaos brings the spark. control brings the strike. 🔥⚽️

choices being made, goals being scored. 

the Predator vs. F50 rivalry spilled onto the pitch this weekend. 😮‍💨🔥

node.text:
alors … t’as choisi ? ​ so… have you made your choice?​
​
it’s Predator or F50. we’re going up, choose now. 🫡

the stories that made them great, back in a year to write new chapters 🌎🔙✨​
​
introducing our Americas Bring Back jerseys, available now. 🔗​

node.text:
a special one for team F50.🩵🌪️​
​
F50 Tunit Leo Messi, available now. 🔗

twenty five years of moments written in the stars. ⭐️⚽️​
​
meet the 2026 UEFA Champions League Anniversary Ball, a modern take on the first starball.​
the stage is set. it’s decision time. ⏳🌪️⚖️✨
lights out, laced up: time for some chaos.🙂‍↕️🌪️

node.text: control is never lost, only reclaimed. ❤️⏳
they already chose 🤝 your turn now.
chaos plays loud. control stays cold. 😤🕹️🌪️

node.text:
one breaks the rhythm. one writes the rules.🌪️🕹️

two headline acts share one stage in the Born For Goals pack, available now. 🔗

two forces. one obsession🌪️⚽️🕹️
introducing the Born For Goals pack, available now. 🔗

these details >>>>>> 
both built for goals. each born different.

too fast to frame. into the semi finals. 👑

سرعة متتلقطش… لنص النهائي 👑
